thickness.note: Deposited thickness range for butt welds per Table 6 (s in mm).

filletThroat.note: Material thickness range for fillet welds per Table 8 (t in mm).

pipeOd.note: Outside pipe diameter range per Table 7 (D in mm). Plate test qualifies pipe OD ≥ 500 mm (§5.3 b).

positionMapBw.note: Table 9 — range of qualification for welding positions for butt welds (§5.8). See also §5.3.

positionMapFw.note: Table 10 — range of qualification for welding positions for fillet welds (§5.8). See also §5.3.

materialGroupMap.note: Parent material group coverage per ISO/TR 15608 groupings (§5.2).

jointTypeMap.note: A butt weld test also qualifies fillet welds; a fillet test qualifies fillet welds only.
